problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
